action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 11 training failed because ReduceLROnPlateau no longer accepts 'verbose' keyword (removed in PyTorch >=2.1). No eval submitted. Baseline dev EER 0.2783 from frozen encoder (2 epochs). Analysis: Need to fix scheduler and add data augmentation to improve generalization to unseen attacks/channels. Unfreezing XLS-R-300M with augmentation and longer training should reduce EER. Decision: Update train.py with scheduler fix, raw waveform augmentations (random gain, additive noise, time mask), gradient accumulation (effective batch 16), and run 10 epochs. Use batch_size=8 to avoid OOM. Submit eval after training to get updated test EER (if harness works).
